name: Fig Butterscotch Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy frying pan over medium heat.
2. Stir in brown sugar and cook, stirring until the sugar is completely dissolved.
3. Blend well to ensure all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Add ground figs and nut meats to the mixture.
5. Remove from heat and add vanilla extract.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
7. Allow to cool completely before serving.
